# Chore: expand shared agent workflows

## Summary

Add additional reusable prompts and contributor-facing guidance so GitHub Copilot, Codex, and Claude Code can follow the same review and refactor workflows.

## Scope

- Affected app or package: repository root and `.github/` guidance files.
- In scope: prompt templates, contributor documentation, and related discoverability updates.
- Out of scope: runtime code changes in application packages.

## Checklist

- [x] Confirm the existing prompt and documentation surface.
- [x] Add review-focused prompt guidance.
- [x] Add refactor-focused prompt guidance.
- [x] Add a contributor guide that explains how the agent files fit together.
- [x] Link the contributor guide from the root README.
- [x] Validate the new documentation files.

## Validation

- [x] Review the created files for consistency.
- [x] Check git status or diff for the touched documentation files.
